hooks.command: INPUT=$(cat); PROMPT=$(echo "$INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get('prompt',''))" 2>/dev/null); if echo "$PROMPT" | grep -qEi '(AKIA[A-Z0-9]{16}|ghp_[a-zA-Z0-9]{36}|sk-[a-zA-Z0-9]{20,}|glpat-[a-zA-Z0-9-]{20}|xoxb-[a-zA-Z0-9-]{50,}|ya29\.[a-zA-Z0-9._-]{50,}|AIza[0-9A-Za-z_-]{35}|-----BEGIN (RSA |EC |OPENSSH )?PRIVATE KEY-----|eyJ[a-zA-Z0-9_-]{20,}\.[a-zA-Z0-9_-]{20,}\.|SG\.[a-zA-Z0-9_-]{22}\.[a-zA-Z0-9_-]{43}|sk_live_[a-zA-Z0-9]{24,}|rk_live_[a-zA-Z0-9]{24,}|AC[a-f0-9]{32}|npm_[a-zA-Z0-9]{36}|pypi-[a-zA-Z0-9-_]{100,})'; then echo '[SECRET IN PROMPT] Possible secret pasted into prompt. Remove before continuing.' >&2; exit 2; fi

CMD=$(cat | python3 -c "import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get('tool_input',{}).get('command',''))" 2>/dev/null); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qEi '(rm\s+-r[f ]*\s+[/~.*]|git\s+reset\s+--hard|git\s+push\s+(--force|-f)\b|git\s+clean\s+-[a-z]*f|DROP\s+TABLE|DROP\s+DATABASE|TRUNCATE\s+TABLE|kubectl\s+delete|docker\s+system\s+prune\s+-a|format\s+[A-Z]:|chmod\s+-R?\s*777\s+/|dd\s+.*of=/dev/|mkfs\.|shred\s)'; then echo '[BLOCKED] Destructive command detected. Review carefully before proceeding.' >&2; exit 2; fi

CMD=$(cat | python3 -c 'import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get("tool_input",{}).get("command",""))' 2>/dev/null); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE '\-\-no-verify'; then echo '[BLOCKED] --no-verify is not allowed. Fix the hook failure instead.' >&2; exit 2; fi; BRANCH=$(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null); if echo "$BRANCH" | grep -qE '^(main|master)$'; then echo "[WARNING] Committing to $BRANCH. Create a feature branch unless intentional." >&2; fi; for f in $(git diff --cached --name-only 2>/dev/null); do case "$f" in *.py) python3 -m ruff check --fix "$f" 2>/dev/null && python3 -m ruff format "$f" 2>/dev/null ;; *.ts|*.tsx|*.js|*.jsx) npx --yes biome check --write "$f" 2>/dev/null ;; *.go) gofumpt -w "$f" 2>/dev/null ;; *.rs) rustfmt "$f" 2>/dev/null ;; esac; done; git add -u 2>/dev/null || true

CONTENT=$(cat | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin).get('tool_input',{}); print(d.get('content','') + d.get('new_string',''))" 2>/dev/null); if echo "$CONTENT" | grep -qEi '(sk-[a-zA-Z0-9]{20,}|AKIA[A-Z0-9]{16}|ghp_[a-zA-Z0-9]{36}|glpat-[a-zA-Z0-9-]{20}|Bearer\s+[a-zA-Z0-9._-]{20,}|xoxb-[a-zA-Z0-9-]{50,}|ya29\.[a-zA-Z0-9._-]{50,}|AIza[0-9A-Za-z_-]{35}|-----BEGIN (RSA |EC |OPENSSH )?PRIVATE KEY-----|eyJ[a-zA-Z0-9_-]{20,}\.[a-zA-Z0-9_-]{20,}\.|SG\.[a-zA-Z0-9_-]{22}\.[a-zA-Z0-9_-]{43}|sk_live_[a-zA-Z0-9]{24,}|rk_live_[a-zA-Z0-9]{24,}|AC[a-f0-9]{32}|npm_[a-zA-Z0-9]{36}|pypi-[a-zA-Z0-9-_]{100,})'; then echo '[SECRET DETECTED] Possible API key or token in file content. Use environment variables instead.' >&2; exit 2; fi

INPUT=$(cat); SESSION_ID=$(echo "$INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get('session_id',''))" 2>/dev/null); TRANSCRIPT=$(echo "$INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get('transcript_path',''))" 2>/dev/null); cozempic guard --daemon ${SESSION_ID:+--session $SESSION_ID} 2>/dev/null || true; cozempic digest inject ${TRANSCRIPT:+--session $TRANSCRIPT} 2>/dev/null || true

TRANSCRIPT=$(cat | python3 -c "import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get('transcript_path',''))" 2>/dev/null); cozempic checkpoint 2>/dev/null || true; cozempic digest flush ${TRANSCRIPT:+--session $TRANSCRIPT} 2>/dev/null || true
cozempic post-compact 2>/dev/null || true; cozempic digest inject 2>/dev/null || true

INPUT=$(cat); if [ "$(echo "$INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get('stop_hook_active','false'))" 2>/dev/null)" = "true" ]; then exit 0; fi; TRANSCRIPT=$(echo "$INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get('transcript_path',''))" 2>/dev/null); cozempic checkpoint 2>/dev/null || true; cozempic digest flush ${TRANSCRIPT:+--session $TRANSCRIPT} 2>/dev/null || true
